rules.license_plate: font-mono font-bold tracking-widest bg-gray-100 text-gray-900 px-3 py-1 rounded-md border border-gray-200

spacing_and_layout.strategy: Mobile-first, Dense Data with generous padding for touch targets.
spacing_and_layout.map_container: absolute inset-0 z-0 bg-gray-100 w-full h-screen overflow-hidden
spacing_and_layout.top_pill: absolute top-6 left-6 right-6 z-10 px-4 py-3 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl border border-black/5 rounded-2xl shadow-lg flex items-center justify-between
spacing_and_layout.bottom_sheet: absolute bottom-0 w-full z-20 bg-white rounded-t-3xl pt-2 pb-8 px-6 shadow-[0_-20px_40px_-15px_rgba(0,0,0,0.1)] flex flex-col gap-6 transform transition-transform duration-300
spacing_and_layout.sheet_handle: w-12 h-1.5 bg-gray-200 rounded-full mx-auto cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing
spacing_and_layout.provider_info_grid: flex items-center gap-4 py-4 border-b border-gray-100

components_and_interactions.Map: Use 'lucide-react' Map or a stylized div overlay representing a map background if actual map (e.g. Mapbox) is not implemented. MVP: Use a static pattern or grid background (`bg-gray-100` with `bg-[url(...)]` subtle dot pattern). Add an SVG route line (black stroke).

Markers.Client: Pulsing blue or black dot (`w-4 h-4 bg-black rounded-full shadow-[0_0_0_8px_rgba(0,0,0,0.1)] animate-pulse`).
Markers.Provider: A floating white card with a subtle shadow and the 'lucide-react' Truck icon inside (`bg-white p-2 rounded-full shadow-lg border border-gray-100`). Animate the position using framer-motion to slide smoothly along the SVG route.

Status_State_Machine.confirmed: Provider assigned. ETA: 20 mins. Badge: gray/neutral.
Status_State_Machine.on_route: Driving to location. ETA: decreasing. Badge: blue/orange.
Status_State_Machine.arrived_soon: Distance < 200m. Status: 'Almost there!'. Accent color shifts to #FF5C00 (Primary). Show prominent warning banner.
Status_State_Machine.auto_arrived: Distance < 100m. Status: 'Arrived'. Accent color shifts to #10B981 (Success). ETA changes to '0 min'.
Status_State_Machine.delay_handling: If ETA increases, show warning pill: 'Traffic delay: +5 mins' in #F59E0B.

components_and_interactions.Trust_Signals: Badge reading 'Verified Pro', '⭐ 4.9 (854 jobs)'. Use `lucide-react` 'ShieldCheck' icon.

Buttons.Primary: w-full py-4 bg-black hover:bg-gray-900 text-white font-bold rounded-xl transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2
Buttons.Secondary: w-full py-4 bg-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-200 text-gray-900 font-bold rounded-xl transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2
Buttons.Emergency: w-full py-4 bg-red-50 text-red-600 font-bold rounded-xl hover:bg-red-100 transition-colors

media_assets.map_placeholder_bg: data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg width='40' height='40' viewBox='0 0 40 40' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cpath d='M20 20.5V18H0v-2h20v-2h2v2h20v2H22v2.5h20v2H22v2h-2v-2H0v-2h20z' fill='%239C92AC' fill-opacity='0.05' fill-rule='evenodd'/%3E%3C/svg%3E

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup standard tailwind config with colors defined above.
2. Build the main layout: Absolute full-screen Map container (z-0), fixed top Status Pill (z-10), fixed Bottom Sheet (z-20).
3. Use Framer Motion for animating the Provider Marker along an SVG path (simulating a live ride route) and for the bottom sheet drag interactions.

4. Implement a robust simulation interval (e.g. `useEffect` with `setInterval`) to cycle through statuses: confirmed -> on_route -> almost_there -> arrived. Update ETA, Distance, and Marker position smoothly.
5. Format the Provider Info carefully: Big bold ETA (e.g., '12 min'), Avatar, Name, Rating, and Vehicle Plate (e.g. 'XYZ 987' in monospace).
6. Add a clear Call button and Cancel button. Render anomaly/delay handling (e.g., simulated traffic delay) after a few seconds of 'on_route'.
7. DO NOT use generic fonts like Inter. Use Cabinet Grotesk for headings and Work Sans for body, JetBrains Mono for numbers/plates.
8. Ensure every actionable item has a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid='call-provider-button'`).
